title: Preparation of Human Red Blood Cells for Scanning Electron Microscopy Imaging
author: Marie Anne Balanant
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yvhfw36
materials: Cover with a layer of gold palladium

steps.title: Prepare glass coverslips by incubating them...
steps.instruction: Prepare glass coverslips by incubating them in 10 % volume poly-D-lysine solution in PBS for 00:30:00 at RT

steps.title: Dry and keep at 4 °C until use
steps.instruction: Dry and keep at 4 °C until use

steps.title: Wash 100 µL of RBC in...
steps.instruction: Wash 100 µL of RBC in 900 µL PBS ( 00:02:00, at 1000g )

steps.title: Resuspend 25 µL of the RBC...
steps.instruction: Resuspend 25 µL of the RBC suspension in 475 µL of PBS

steps.title: Add 500 µL of 2 %...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of 2 % volume glutaraldehyde solution in PBS to the cell suspension slowly (drop by drop) to reach a final glutaraldehyde concentration of 1% Work under a fume hood when using glutaraldehyde

steps.title: Wash with 1 mL of PBS...
steps.instruction: Wash with 1 mL of PBS ( 00:02:00, at 1000g )

steps.title: Dilute 100 µL of fixed cells...
steps.instruction: Dilute 100 µL of fixed cells suspension into 400 µL PBS

steps.title: Incubate 200 µL of diluted cell...
steps.instruction: Incubate 200 µL of diluted cell suspension on a poly-D-lysine coated coverslip ( 01:00:00 ) in corresponding buffer (in 6-wells plates)

steps.title: Rince slide 2 times with PBS (without scratching/damaging cell layer)
steps.instruction: Rince slide 2 times with PBS (without scratching/damaging cell layer)

steps.title: Incubate in 0
steps.instruction: Incubate in 0.1 Molarity (M) cacodylate buffer ( 00:10:00 ) . Repeat step 3 times Work under a fume hood during this section, check waste disposal for the different chemicals

steps.title: Post-fix with 1 Mass Percent osmium tetroxide ( 01:00:00 )
steps.instruction: Post-fix with 1 Mass Percent osmium tetroxide ( 01:00:00 )

steps.title: Dehydrate the sample with ethanol -...
steps.instruction: Dehydrate the sample with ethanol - Ethanol 40 % volume ( 00:10:00 ) - Ethanol 50 % volume ( 00:10:00 ) - Ethanol 60 % volume ( 00:10:00 ) - Ethanol 70 % volume ( 00:10:00 ) - Ethanol 80 % volume ( 00:10:00 ) - Ethanol 90 % volume ( 00:10:00 ) - Ethanol 100 % volume ( 00:15:00 ) - Ethanol 100 % volume ( 00:15:00 )

steps.title: Incubate in HDMS ( 00:30:00 )
steps.instruction: Incubate in HDMS ( 00:30:00 ). Repear step twice

steps.title: Dry under the hood for 00:30:00...
steps.instruction: Dry under the hood for 00:30:00 minimum (place filter paper under coverslip to prevent attaching to the culture plate)
